SHORT NAME: INTDIS_MEDICARE_EVER 

LONG NAME: INTDIS_MEDICARE_EVER 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The earliest possible date for anyone in the CCW is January 1, 1999. If the beneficiary became eligible 
for Medicare after that, the earliest possible date will be some time after his/her coverage start date 
(i.e., the COVSTART
